event: Aave V2 CRV market REALIZED bad debt (~$1.6M) 2022-11-22 — Avi Eisenberg's CRV-short attack on Aave V2 (Ethereum) failed (CRV rose instead of crashing), but the forced liquidations of his ~92M-CRV short could NOT fully cover the debt: Aave V2 was left with ~2.64M CRV (~$1.6–1.7M) of irretrievable debt = a reserve deficit / realized bad debt that impairs CRV-market depositors (later repaid Jan-2023 from the Aave treasury, with ~$280k subsidized by Gauntlet's insolvency fund). The realized impairment — outstanding debt > recoverable collateral, so depositors can't be made whole — is the distinct BAD_DEBT signal; it is host-fed via lending_risk.bad_debt_usd and independent of any peg/oracle probe.
source: Post-mortem documented deficit ~$1.6M (= 2.64M CRV at the time): The Defiant, Blockworks ($1.7M), Cointelegraph, Aave Governance ARC (repay excess CRV debt for Aave V2 ETH), Kaiko Research, arXiv 2302.04068. Snapshots now encode the surrounding reserve state MEASURED on-chain (Aave V2 LendingPool 0x7d2768dE32b0b80b7a3454c06BdAc94A69DDc7A9 getReserveData(CRV): LTV/LT/liqBonus/reserveFactor/is_frozen decoded from the config word; utilization from variableDebtToken.totalSupply over CRV.balanceOf(aCRV)+debt; amount_token = aCRV.totalSupply; amount_usd via Chainlink CRV/USD 0xCd627aA160A6fA45Eb793D19Ef54f5062F20f33f). The decisive d12 input lending_risk.bad_debt_usd stays host-fed / off-chain-derived (per-position health, not a single on-chain read). On-chain block 16040000 (block ts 2022-11-24T13:00:59Z) anchors the Aave V2 CRV market identity (CRV 0xD533a949740bb3306d119CC777fa900bA034cd52). See EVENT.md and snapshots/fidelity.json (16/18 measured = 88.9%).

cases.note: After Eisenberg's CRV-short attack failed, the forced liquidations of his ~92M-CRV short on Aave V2 could not fully cover the debt — CRV rose during the unwind, so the discounted USDC collateral seized fell short of the CRV owed, leaving Aave V2 with ~2.64M CRV (~$1.6–1.7M) of irretrievable debt. The snapshot encodes this documented deficit as host-fed lending_risk.bad_debt_usd = 1600000 on edge CRV-aave_v2-collateral (protocol_class: lending). A realized reserve deficit means outstanding debt > recoverable collateral, so depositors in the CRV market cannot be made whole — exactly what BAD_DEBT must surface, independent of any peg/oracle probe (the price-crash/oracle attempts are upstream causes; this is the realized impairment). $1.6M is well above the ~$1M actionable floor → fire. Severity HIGH (a real, actionable market deficit), NOT CRITICAL: it is far below a systemic ~$50M+ hole and was within Aave's backstop limits (later repaid from treasury / Gauntlet insolvency fund). Edge identity anchored on-chain via block 16040000 (block ts 2022-11-24T13:00:59Z, post-liquidation). MEASURED BACKFILL (data-only; judgment unchanged): reserve config read on-chain CONFIRMS the labelled premise — LTV 0.55, LT 0.61, reserve_factor 0.20, is_frozen false (all match the modelled values); liquidation_bonus measured 1.08 (was null). Utilization measured 0.5053 (was hand-modelled 0.65 — flagged: real util is LOWER, not higher, but immaterial to BAD_DEBT which keys on the deficit). Venue size measured FAR larger than modelled: aCRV.totalSupply = 127,531,805 CRV (~$87.6M at $0.686973) vs modelled 20,000,000 CRV / $12M. bad_debt_usd KEPT asserted (1,600,000): the realized deficit is off-chain-derived per-position health, NOT a single on-chain read, so it remains host-fed (fidelity measured=false) — no fabrication. No contradiction: every on-chain-readable fact confirms market identity and parameters.

Negative control: same Aave V2 CRV market (edge CRV-aave_v2-collateral), pre-attack on 2022-11-01, with lending_risk.bad_debt_usd = 0 — a solvent, healthy lending market (identical params except the deficit). A zero reserve deficit means depositors are fully covered, so BAD_DEBT MUST stay silent, and nothing WARN-or-above should emit (max_emitted WARN/0). This guards the bad-debt detector against firing on a healthy market and proves the signal keys on the realized deficit, not on the market's mere existence or CRV's identity. MEASURED BACKFILL (data-only; judgment unchanged): reserve config read on-chain @ block 15870000 (block ts 2022-10-31T19:02:23Z) — LTV 0.55, LT 0.61, liquidation_bonus 1.08, reserve_factor 0.20, is_frozen false (same params as the incident block, as expected for a parameter-stable control). Utilization measured 0.4571 (was 0.65). Venue size measured aCRV.totalSupply = 163,372,017 CRV (~$144.5M at $0.884506) vs modelled 20,000,000 CRV / $12M. bad_debt_usd = 0 KEPT asserted (off-chain-derived, healthy by construction; fidelity measured=false). Identical params except the deficit holds against the measured data.
